PLAINTIFF JOHNSON LUONG'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. DISMISSAL ORDER IS VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED CASE SCHEDULED FOR AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: UNINSURED MOTORIST ON 9/3/2008 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: TRINA AYALA, CSR#12964. (212)

MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Johnson Luong's Motion to Vacate Dismissal of Uninsured Motorist Claim is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal Order is vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re: Uninsured Motorist on 9/3/2008 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212.
